title: A Choice of Deadly Drones Is Only a Few Clicks Away for Ukrainian Troops
summary_full: Ukraine has created online marketplaces to let units select their own drones, a break from generations of standardized and centralized weapons procurement.
summary_public: Ukraine has created online marketplaces to let units select their own drones, a break from generations of standardized and centralized weapons procurement.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine has created online marketplaces to let units select their own drones
